title: lotononis glabra
intro: Lotononis glabra, also known as the stink bush, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its unpleasant odor when bruised or crushed. The medicinal properties of Lotononis glabra include its ability to exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Lotononis glabra typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
